summary: Tested Release Notes notification system (unread count, mark-read, red dot) and Trailer generation endpoint validation. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Release notes unread count correctly tracks user's last_seen_release_version vs latest version
Red notification dot appears in mobile menu when unread_count > 0 (verified with screenshot)
Trailer duration validation defaults invalid values to 4 (code check at line 6125-6126)
Trailer generation requires film ownership - correctly returns 404 for non-owned films

success_rate.backend: 100% (6 passed, 2 skipped - test user has no films)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing release notes data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Release notes notification system is fully functional. The red dot appears in mobile menu when user has unread release notes (verified by setting last_seen_release_version to 0.050 which showed 7 unread notes). Trailer generation endpoint validation is working - duration must be 4, 8, or 12 seconds (defaults to 4 if invalid). Trailer generation requires film ownership.

features_tested.release_notes_unread_count: PASSED - Correctly returns unread_count, last_seen_version, latest_version
features_tested.release_notes_mark_read: PASSED - Updates last_seen_release_version and resets unread_count to 0
features_tested.release_notes_red_dot_mobile: PASSED - Red dot visible in mobile menu when unread_count > 0 (screenshot verified)
features_tested.release_notes_page: PASSED - Shows all release notes with version, title, date, and changes
features_tested.trailer_duration_validation: PASSED - Code validates duration must be 4, 8, or 12 (defaults to 4)
features_tested.trailer_film_ownership: PASSED - Returns 404 'Film non trovato' for non-owned/non-existent films

screenshots: .screenshots/04_mobile_menu_with_red_dot.png - Shows red dot next to Release Notes in mobile menu
.screenshots/07_release_notes_page.png - Shows Release Notes page with all versions
